## Change Classification

<!-- Choose one -->
- [ ] **Errata** — Factual correction only; no policy change
- [ ] **Minor Amendment** — Clarification or refinement; no material policy change
- [ ] **Major Amendment** — Substantive policy change, new requirement, or new section
- [ ] **New Section** — Addition of an entirely new governance section

---

## Governance Pre-Checks

- [ ] A corresponding issue was opened and received Governance Committee approval in principle before this PR was drafted
- [ ] The proposed change supports defensive cybersecurity governance (not offensive capability)
- [ ] All new requirements are implementable and proportionate to the threat addressed
- [ ] At least one authoritative reference supports any new factual claims (added to `docs/references.md`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has been updated with a description of this change under the appropriate version heading
- [ ] The document style guide (see CONTRIBUTING.md) has been followed: British English, present tense, imperative mood for mandates
